task: Given an embedded packet of three option quote records and three remediation options with costs and a max budget, (1) compute put-call parity residuals and apply provided rules to classify stale quotes (residual > 0.75) and violations of monotonic call-price-with-strike; (2) perform sensitivity analysis around the governing threshold (0.75) to identify records whose stale/stable classification is unstable; (3) enumerate feasible remediation plans (including partial or combined remediation applications if allowed by rules) that respect max_budget and identify the risk-weighted recommended actions; (4) produce a spreadsheet (options_parity_3.xlsx) containing all formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations to the embedded packet, and a narrative expert memo (expert_memo.md) that documents explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, final recommendation table, and any items marked needs_review. Do not invent inputs; use only the embedded packet. Mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
